items.title: Enhance Token Billing with Prompt Details in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the billing process by including `prompt_tokens_details` in the usage data sent to the Gateway. Previously, this information was omitted, making cache tokens invisible for billing purposes. Key changes were made to `chat_base.py` to extract and include these details, ensuring accurate billing for cached tokens.

items.title: Enhance provider fallback with 403 status in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the 403 status code to the RETRYABLE_STATUS_CODES, allowing the worker to retry with fallback providers when an upstream service returns a 403 error. This change addresses issues where clients could not access services due to provider authentication or quota problems, ensuring better reliability in service delivery.

items.title: Update USDC References to Bridged USDC in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns the USDC token naming with Circle's standard by changing references to 'Bridged USDC (SKALE Bridge)' in the settings and chain handler files. Key modifications include updated comments and docstrings to enhance clarity and maintain consistency across the codebase. These changes ensure that the documentation accurately reflects the current implementation.

items.title: Update USDC Token Name for SKALE Chain in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the USDC token name on the SKALE chain to 'Bridged USDC (SKALE Bridge)' as per Circle's standard. The EIP-712 domain name in the X402 payment configuration has been modified accordingly. This change ensures compliance with the naming conventions and improves clarity for users.

items.title: Enhance Claude Cache Token Billing in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces cache token billing for Claude models, addressing a significant revenue loss by incorporating cached_tokens and cached_creation_tokens into the billing system. The changes affect 14 Claude model rules, ensuring accurate pricing based on Anthropic's official ratios. Additionally, 21 new tests have been added to validate the implementation, bringing the total test count to 628.

items.title: Enhance JetBrains Publish Logic in M C P Short U R L 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the publishing workflow to skip the JetBrains plugin publishing when the token is not set, improving error handling. Additionally, it adds the .kotlin/ directory to the .gitignore file to prevent unnecessary tracking. These changes streamline the development process and enhance the project's maintainability.

items.title: Enhance JetBrains Publish Logic in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the publish workflow to skip the JetBrains plugin publishing if the publish token is not set, preventing unnecessary errors. Additionally, it adds the `.kotlin/` directory to the `.gitignore` file to keep the repository clean. These changes improve the overall reliability of the publishing process.

items.title: Enhance JetBrains Publish Logic in M C P Seedance 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the publish workflow to skip the JetBrains plugin publishing when the token is not set, preventing unnecessary errors. Additionally, it adds the .kotlin/ directory to the .gitignore file to keep the repository clean. These changes improve the overall reliability of the publishing process.

items.title: Enhance JetBrains Publish Workflow in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the JetBrains publish workflow to skip the publishing process when the required token is not set. Additionally, it adds the .kotlin/ directory to the .gitignore file to prevent unnecessary files from being tracked. These changes improve the build process and streamline development.

items.title: Enhance JetBrains Publish Logic in M C P Flux 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the publish workflow to skip the JetBrains plugin publishing step if the JETBRAINS_MARKETPLACE_TOKEN is not set. Additionally, it adds the .kotlin/ directory to the .gitignore file to prevent unnecessary files from being tracked. These changes improve the build process and streamline development.

items.title: Skip JetBrains Publish When No Token in M C P Veo 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the publish workflow to skip the JetBrains plugin publishing if the JETBRAINS_MARKETPLACE_TOKEN is not set. Additionally, it adds the .kotlin/ directory to the .gitignore file to prevent unnecessary tracking. These changes enhance the build process and streamline development.

items.title: Enhance JetBrains Plugin Publish Logic in M C P Sora 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the publish workflow to skip the JetBrains plugin publishing step if the JETBRAINS_MARKETPLACE_TOKEN is not set, ensuring smoother operations. Additionally, the .kotlin/ directory has been added to the .gitignore file to prevent unnecessary files from being tracked. These changes enhance the overall efficiency of the publishing process.

items.title: Skip JetBrains plugin publish when token is missing and update gitignore in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the GitHub workflow to skip the JetBrains plugin publishing step if the JETBRAINS_MARKETPLACE_TOKEN is not set, preventing unnecessary failures. Additionally, the .gitignore file in the JetBrains directory was updated to include the .kotlin/ folder, improving repository cleanliness.

items.title: Enhance JetBrains Publish Process in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the JetBrains publishing workflow by gracefully skipping the publish step when the JETBRAINS_MARKETPLACE_TOKEN is not set. Additionally, the .kotlin/ directory has been added to the .gitignore file to prevent unnecessary files from being tracked. These changes enhance the overall robustness of the publishing process.

items.title: Enhance JetBrains Publish Process in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the JetBrains publishing workflow by skipping the publish step if the JETBRAINS_MARKETPLACE_TOKEN is not set, ensuring a smoother process. Additionally, the .kotlin/ directory has been added to the .gitignore file to prevent unnecessary files from being tracked. These changes enhance the overall efficiency and cleanliness of the project.

items.title: Gracefully skip JetBrains publish when no token in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a check to skip the JetBrains publish process if the JETBRAINS_MARKETPLACE_TOKEN is not set, enhancing the workflow's robustness. Additionally, the .kotlin/ directory has been added to the .gitignore file to prevent unnecessary files from being tracked. These changes improve the overall development experience.

items.title: Introducing JetBrains IDE Plugin for ShortURL MCP in M C P Short U R L 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a JetBrains IDE plugin for the ShortURL MCP server, enhancing the integration with JetBrains tools. Key features include easy setup for API token management and configuration copying for AI Assistant. The README and changelog have been updated to reflect these new capabilities, ensuring users have the necessary information to get started quickly.

items.title: Introducing JetBrains IDE Plugin for NanoBanana in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a JetBrains IDE plugin for the NanoBanana MCP server, enhancing integration with AI tools. The README and changelog have been updated to reflect these changes, ensuring users have the latest information.

items.title: Introducing JetBrains Plugin for Seedance MCP in M C P Seedance 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a JetBrains IDE plugin for the Seedance MCP server, enhancing integration with AI video generation tools. Key features include an easy setup process, API token management, and configuration options for both STDIO and HTTP. The README and changelog have been updated to reflect these changes, ensuring users have the latest information.

items.title: Introducing JetBrains IDE Plugin for Seedream MCP in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a JetBrains IDE plugin for the Seedream MCP server, enhancing integration with AI image generation tools. Key features include an easy setup process, API token management, and a user-friendly settings interface. The plugin is now available for installation from the JetBrains Marketplace.

items.title: Exciting New JetBrains Plugin for Flux MCP in M C P Flux 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a JetBrains IDE plugin for the Flux MCP server, enhancing integration with AI tools. Key additions include a comprehensive README, configuration settings for API tokens, and a user-friendly interface for managing settings. The plugin supports both STDIO and HTTP modes, streamlining the setup process for users.

items.title: Exciting New JetBrains Plugin for Veo MCP in M C P Veo 🚀
items.summary: We've added a JetBrains IDE plugin for the Veo MCP server, enhancing integration with AI tools for video generation. Key features include a settings page for API token management, easy configuration copying, and startup notifications for first-time users. This update aims to streamline the user experience and improve accessibility for developers using JetBrains IDEs.

items.title: Exciting New JetBrains Plugin for Sora MCP in M C P Sora 🚀
items.summary: We've introduced a JetBrains IDE plugin for the Sora MCP server, enhancing the development experience. Key features include a settings UI, configuration copy actions, and a startup notification. Additionally, the README has been updated with setup instructions, and a CI job for publishing the plugin has been added.

items.title: Introducing JetBrains IDE Plugin for Luma MCP in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a comprehensive JetBrains IDE plugin for the Luma MCP server, featuring a settings UI, configuration copy actions, and startup notifications. Key files include the new plugin structure, CI job for publishing, and an updated README with setup instructions. This enhancement streamlines the integration of Luma's AI capabilities into JetBrains IDEs, improving user experience.

items.title: Exciting New JetBrains Plugin for Midjourney MCP in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a complete JetBrains IDE plugin for the Midjourney MCP server, featuring a settings UI, configuration copy actions, and startup notifications. Additionally, a new CI job for publishing the plugin has been added, along with a dedicated setup section in the README. This enhancement streamlines the integration of Midjourney's AI capabilities within JetBrains IDEs.

items.title: Introducing JetBrains IDE Plugin for Serp MCP in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: We've added a new JetBrains IDE plugin for the Serp MCP server, enhancing integration with popular JetBrains IDEs like IntelliJ IDEA and PyCharm. Key features include a settings page for API token configuration, copy configuration actions for AI Assistant setup, and a startup notification for new users. This update also includes automated publishing to the JetBrains Marketplace and an updated README with setup instructions.

items.title: Exciting JetBrains Plugin Launch for MCP Suno in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: We've introduced a new JetBrains IntelliJ Platform plugin for MCP Suno, featuring a settings page for API token management, configuration copying for STDIO/HTTP, and startup notifications. The CI/CD pipeline is now set up for publishing on the JetBrains Marketplace, and the README has been updated with setup instructions. This plugin is compatible with all JetBrains IDEs version 2025.2 and above.

items.title: Enhance GeminiHandler with Fallback for Native Accounts in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: The GeminiHandler has been updated to include a fallback mechanism that allows it to return all accounts when no native accounts are found. This change ensures that the Gemini native API endpoint remains functional even if the checker has not yet synced the native flag to MongoDB. Additionally, the retry mechanism now gracefully handles non-native providers, improving overall reliability.

items.title: Exciting Smithery.ai Integration for Enhanced Publishing in M C P Seedance 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Smithery.ai integration for the MCP server, enabling seamless server discovery and distribution. Key changes include the addition of a `smithery.yaml` configuration file, a new `server.json` for metadata compliance, and a CI job in the GitHub workflow to automate publishing to Smithery after PyPI releases. This enhancement streamlines the deployment process and improves accessibility for users.

items.title: Integrate Smithery.ai Publishing Support in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces integration with Smithery.ai for MCP server discovery and distribution. Key changes include the addition of a `smithery.yaml` configuration file, a new `server.json` for MCP server metadata, and a CI job in the GitHub Actions workflow to automate publishing to Smithery after PyPI releases. This enhancement streamlines the deployment process and improves accessibility for users.

items.title: New Nexior Deployment Guide for GitCode in Backend 🚀
items.summary: We've added comprehensive deployment documentation for the Nexior AI platform using GitCode, a popular Chinese code hosting service. This guide includes step-by-step instructions for importing projects, configuring CI/CD pipelines, and exploring various deployment options like Tencent Cloud and Docker. Both English and Chinese versions are now available to cater to a wider audience.

items.title: Revamped Tencent Cloud and Sealos Guides in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update features a complete rewrite of the Tencent Cloud deployment documentation, now utilizing COS static website hosting and CDN for a serverless experience. Additionally, a new guide for deploying Nexior on Sealos has been introduced, providing a streamlined process for users in China. These enhancements aim to simplify deployment and improve accessibility for developers.

items.title: Exciting New VS Code Extension for ShortURL MCP in M C P Short U R L 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new VS Code extension for the ShortURL MCP, enabling users to create and manage short URLs directly from the editor. Key changes include the addition of necessary files for publishing to the VS Code Marketplace and updates to the workflow for automated publishing. The extension supports AI assistants, enhancing productivity for developers using URL shortening features.

items.title: Launch VS Code Extension for NanoBanana MCP in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the VS Code extension for the NanoBanana MCP, allowing users to generate and edit images using the Ace Data Cloud API. Key files have been added, including the extension's README, LICENSE, and configuration files, along with a new workflow for publishing to the VS Code Marketplace. The extension supports AI assistants like GitHub Copilot and is designed for seamless integration.

items.title: Exciting New VS Code Extension for Seedance MCP in M C P Seedance 🚀
items.summary: We've added a new VS Code extension for Seedance MCP, enabling seamless AI video generation using the Ace Data Cloud API. The update includes a complete directory for the extension, along with a new publish workflow for automatic deployment to the VS Code Marketplace. This enhancement allows users to leverage AI tools directly within their development environment.

items.title: Exciting New VS Code Extension for Seedream MCP in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: We've added a new VS Code extension for the Seedream MCP, enabling seamless AI image generation and editing through the Ace Data Cloud API. This update includes the necessary files for publishing to the VS Code Marketplace and enhances the CI/CD pipeline with a new publishing job. Users can now easily integrate AI assistants like GitHub Copilot with the Seedream model context protocol.

items.title: Enhance Gemini Handler for Native Accounts in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a filter in the GeminiHandler to exclusively handle `native: true` accounts, ensuring that the Gemini format is forwarded without translation. Key changes include modifications to `gemini.py`, `base.py`, and `wcnb.json`, which enhance account retrieval and capability definitions. These improvements streamline the integration with upstream services and optimize performance for native account handling.

items.title: Exciting New VS Code Extension for Flux MCP in M C P Flux 🚀
items.summary: We've added a new VS Code extension for Flux MCP, enabling seamless AI image generation and editing via the Ace Data Cloud API. The extension includes a comprehensive setup guide and integrates with popular AI assistants like GitHub Copilot. Additionally, the publishing workflow has been updated to automate deployment to the VS Code Marketplace with each push.

items.title: Exciting New VS Code Extension for Veo MCP in M C P Veo 🚀
items.summary: We've added a new VS Code extension for the Veo MCP, enabling seamless AI video generation from text and images. This update includes the necessary files for publishing to the VS Code Marketplace, along with an updated workflow for automatic publishing on each push. The extension supports various AI assistants and simplifies setup with zero-install functionality.

items.title: Exciting New VS Code Extension for Sora MCP in M C P Sora 🚀
items.summary: We've added a new VS Code extension for the Sora MCP, enabling seamless AI video generation using OpenAI Sora. This update includes the necessary files for publishing to the VS Code Marketplace and enhances the CI/CD pipeline with a new publish job. Users can now easily integrate AI assistants like GitHub Copilot with the Sora MCP for enhanced functionality.

items.title: Exciting New VS Code Extension for Luma MCP in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: We've added a new VS Code extension for Luma MCP, enabling seamless integration with the Ace Data Cloud API for AI video generation. The extension includes a comprehensive setup guide, features for AI assistants, and a streamlined publishing process to the VS Code Marketplace. Key updates to the workflow ensure that the extension is published automatically with each push.

items.title: Launch of VS Code Extension for Midjourney MCP in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: We've added a new VS Code extension for the Midjourney MCP, enabling seamless AI image generation directly within the editor. Key updates include a new `publish-vscode` job in the workflow for automatic publishing to the VS Code Marketplace, along with essential files like README, LICENSE, and CHANGELOG for user guidance. This extension enhances integration with AI assistants, providing 15 tools for creative tasks.

items.title: Exciting New VS Code Extension for Serp MCP in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: We've added a new VS Code extension for the Serp MCP, enabling seamless integration with Google Search via the SERP API. This update includes a complete directory for the extension, along with a new publish workflow to the VS Code Marketplace. Key features include support for AI assistants and automatic package management, enhancing user experience and functionality.

items.title: Launch of VS Code Extension for Suno MCP in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: We've added a new VS Code extension for the Suno MCP, enabling seamless AI music generation directly within the editor. This update includes the necessary files for publishing to the VS Code Marketplace, along with a new workflow for automated publishing on each push. Key features include integration with AI assistants and a user-friendly setup process.
